title: VimFu — zb Cursor to Bottom
description: zb scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the bottom. Useful when you want to see everything above the current line.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z B scrolls the screen so your cursor line is at the bottom. Use it when you want to see everything above.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump to a line, scroll to bottom ---

steps.say: Jump to line twenty three. The finish method.
Z B. Push the cursor to the bottom of the screen.
Now you can see the Hero class above and all the methods that lead up to this one.

steps.comment: --- Demo 2: compare with zz and zt ---

steps.say: Z T moves it to the top.
And Z B back to the bottom.
Same cursor line, three different viewports.
Z B. Cursor line to the bottom. Z Z for center, Z T for top, Z B for bottom.
